Semi-Private Tour

Sagrada Familia

Discover Gaudí's Masterpiece in an Intimate Setting. Maximum 9 guests.

Semi-Private Tour of Sagrada Família

Explore the world-famous Sagrada Família with a small group of just 9 guests. Designed for travelers who value quality over crowds, this semi-private experience offers deeper insight into the genius of Antoni Gaudí and his unfinished masterpiece.

⏱
Duration
1.5 – 2 hours
👥
Group Size
Max. 9 people
🌐
Languages
EN, FR, PT, RU
🎟
Tickets
Skip-the-line included

Tour Highlights

  • Small group experience (maximum 9 participants)
  • Skip-the-line access to save time
  • Expert local guide specialized in Gaudí and Barcelona history
  • Immersive storytelling about symbolism, architecture, and history
  • Stunning interior visit with colorful stained-glass light

Itinerary

1

Meeting Point

Conveniently located near the basilica. Meet your guide and begin with a short introduction to Gaudí's vision.

2

Exterior Exploration

Discover the intricate façades—Nativity, Passion, and Glory—and uncover their symbolic meanings.

3

Interior Visit

Step inside and experience the awe-inspiring columns, natural light effects, and unique architectural design inspired by nature.

Optional Enhancements

  • Tower access for panoramic views of Barcelona
  • Extended Gaudí-focused tours

Dress Code: Appropriate attire required (religious site)

Accessibility: Please inquire for specific needs

Book Your Experience

Limited availability – advance booking recommended

Premium guided tours in Barcelona since 2012. Quality over quantity.
